settings.title: Jenna Ushkowitz
Tony Robbins
settings.sub_title: Tony unleashes his power within using a JumpSport to energize before presenting and to lymphasize.
settings.copy:
Tony Robbins has a JumpSport Fitness Trampoline shipped ahead of time to his large events so that he can energize before he goes on stage.

His Platinum Lions Members rebound regularly to help detox and cleanse the body.

The TonyRobbins.com article The 10-day health challenge says, "Research has shown that an exercise technique called rebounding will help your lymphatic system the most. Each day, 20–30 minutes of rebounding, or bouncing, preferably on a “rebounder,” will help provide the ideal conditions for cleansing your cells."

settings.title: Milla Jovovich
settings.sub_title: Unconventional training with the trampoline keeps Milla conditioned for any physically active role.
settings.copy: Milla incorporates rebounding into her circuit training routine with Trampoline Trim just outside of LA. These unconventional challenge her in ways no other piece of equipment can.

settings.title: Jenna Ushkowitz
settings.sub_title: "Prepare to become addicted to one of the best workouts ever."
settings.copy:
Jenna completed 380+ online workouts from the ness in about a year.

"If someone asked me what three things i could bring to a deserted island, it'd be a machete, my dog bear and my trampoline."

Read the article: Actress, singer and producer Jenna Ushkowitz shares 7 things she wishes she knew before her first bounce class

settings.title: Kate Beckinsale
settings.sub_title: "I just got into trampolining, and it's the greatest thing."
settings.copy:
Women's Health featured a cover article detailing Kate's extensive training including doing online trampoline workouts from the comfort of her own home.

"It makes you feel kind of jolly!"

settings.title: Julianne Hough
settings.sub_title: "I’m a high-energy person, so I really like those high-energy, sweat-it-out workouts,"
settings.copy:
Julianne loves trampoline workouts with Simone De La Rue, founder of Body By Simone, an LA based studio.

She says, "My whole thing is, I’m not doing it necessarily to make my body look good—I’m doing it because I love it and it's fun"

settings.title: Gweneth Paltrow
settings.sub_title: “Feeling like a happy kid doing thenessnyc workout! So good!”
settings.copy:
Gweneth Paltrow has trained with the ness studio in New York. Her company, Goop, has featured the ness online and at local events.

Read the article: A Trampoline Cardio Workout You Can Do in Your Living Room

settings.title: Why Celebrities Love JumpSport
settings.copy:
Rebounding has become a go-to workout for many celebrities, and for good reason! Here are the top three reasons why stars love bouncing on a mini-trampoline:

  1. Rebounding engages muscles from head to toe while being gentle on the joints, making it perfect for staying fit without strain.
  2. The up-and-down motion stimulates lymphatic drainage, helping to flush out toxins and keep energy levels high.
  3. Unlike traditional workouts, rebounding feels playful and enjoyable while still delivering serious results in strength, balance, and endurance.

settings.title: Goldie Hawn’s JumpSport 39" ESSENTIAL Trampoline
settings.copy: Goldie Hawn’s first ever Instagram post showed her rebounding on her JumpSport Fitness Trampoline. But when her trampoline dance post went viral, it was featured in articles on Vogue, Today, Women’s Health, and Good Morning America. Why? Because bouncing on a trampoline is fun and the massive endorphin rush helps you let loose “like nobody’s watching."

settings.title: Eva Longoria's JumpSport 39" PREMIUM Trampoline
settings.copy: Eva Longoria's love of the JumpSport fitness trampoline was shared with the world during an unboxing video on Instagram of a model 350 her friend gifted to her. Since then, she proudly shows off her trampoline with regular postings about her rebounder workouts and has been the topic of discussion for many major magazines who follow celebrity health trends; especially ones that work! She is healthy, strong, toned, and still has energy to maintain a busy work and busy mom schedule.

settings.title: Jennifer Garner's JumpSport 39" PRO Trampoline
settings.copy: Jennifer Garner reveals in Women’s Health how she sets herself up for success by preparing her workout clothes and coffee maker the night before so she is ready for her trampoline or circuit workout in the morning. "Even if I can only do it for 20 minutes, I make sure I'm sweating by the end, and that's a victory. I don't judge myself."
